blended.narrative: Snowshoe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.
Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
